attributes.name: Calendar
attributes.summary: The Calendar component provides an interactive and flexible calendar interface for managing and viewing scheduled events. It offers multiple presentation formats tailored for different contexts, including isolated, embedded, and fitted views. The component displays the current month and year, allows navigation between months, and highlights specific dates with scheduled events. Users can select dates to view or add events, with inline forms enabling event creation directly within the calendar. The primary purpose of the Calendar is to facilitate event scheduling, visualization, and management within a user-friendly interface.
